rationale: All brief elements are present and correct: exact title '2025 Revenue ($M)' top-left, four #5B8CFF bars with rounded tops proportional to 8.2/9.1/11.4/14.0, thin baseline, muted Q1-Q4 labels, and value labels riding above the bars. The filmstrip shows the full choreography: empty frame with baseline, title in, staggered left-to-right bar growth with counting labels (mid-count values like 2.6 and 8.1/8.5/9.5/9.0 visible), a hold at final values, and a complete fade-out by the last frame; the decelerating ease reads in the near-final heights at 25% while counters finish. Composition is balanced with consistent gaps and centered labels, and typography is bold, high-contrast, and consistent, with a small blue title underline as the only unbriefed (harmless) addition.
